Generate content and images using Gemini: Generate content and images using Gemini and Imagen models on Google Vertex AI.
The complete JSON content from your Goog: The complete JSON content from your Google Service Account key file.
\n To authenticate with Google Vertex A:
To authenticate with Google Vertex AI using a Service Account:
  1. Go to [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com).
  2. Create a new project or select an existing one.
  3. Enable the **Vertex AI API** under *APIs & Services > Enabled APIs*.
  4. Create a Service Account:
     - Go to **IAM & Admin > Service Accounts**.
     - Click **Create Service Account**, fill in the details and click **Create**.
     - Grant the **Vertex AI User** role.
  5. Create a JSON key:
     - Click on the created service account.
     - Go to the **Keys** tab.
     - Click **Add Key > Create new key**, choose **JSON** and click **Create**.
     - The JSON key file will be downloaded automatically.
  6. Copy the **entire contents** of the downloaded JSON file and paste it below.

Controls randomness. Lower values are mo: Controls randomness. Lower values are more deterministic (0–2). Leave empty to use the model default.

Controls how much the model thinks befor: Controls how much the model thinks before responding. Supported on Gemini 2.5 and later models.
Maximum number of tokens the model can u: Maximum number of tokens the model can use for internal reasoning. Set to 0 to disable thinking. Supported on Gemini 2.5 and later models.
When enabled, the model's reasoning is r: When enabled, the model's reasoning is returned alongside the final response. Supported on Gemini 2.5 and later models.
